summary: The Mann-Whitney U test is a non-parametric test used when data do not follow a normal distribution. It serves as an appropriate substitute for parametric tests such as the student’s t-test or one-way ANOVA under conditions where assumptions of normality fail.

It serves as an appropriate substitute for parametric tests such as the student’s t-test or one-way ANOVA under conditions where assumptions of normality fail.. Answer choice: C
